questionHtml: Using a poverty cycle diagram, explain how the government of Pakistan could intervene to “break out of the poverty cycle” (paragraph [3]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

Example of poverty cycle (any cycle, including investment and starting and ending with an indicator of poverty, is acceptable).
